FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Struct TextUndoOp

Namespace
FluentGpu.Text
Assembly
FluentGpu.Text.dll

One reversible edit against an EditDocument: the op replaced Removed with Inserted at Start. Undo = remove Inserted.Length at Start, re-insert Removed, restore AnchorBefore/ActiveBefore; redo is the inverse with the After pair — so undo/redo restore the EXACT caret/selection the user saw, not a recomputed approximation.

public readonly struct TextUndoOp

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
